feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Rafale to join IAF, security beefed up at Ambala Air Force

link.title: Rafale to join IAF, security beefed up at Ambala Air Force

entry.content: Security has been beefed up at Ambala Air Force Station ahead of the arrival of Rafale jets and the station is fully prepared to welcome Rafale jets, which will arrive in India after covering a distance of almost 7,364 kilometres. It is learnt that around 3 kilometer area near Ambala Air Force Station has been declared as a no-drone zone.
entry.summary: Security has been beefed up at Ambala Air Force Station ahead of the arrival of Rafale jets and the station is fully prepared to welcome Rafale jets, which will arrive in India after covering a distance of almost 7,364 kilometres. It is learnt that around 3 kilometer area near Ambala Air Force Station has been declared as a no-drone zone.

entry.title: Présidentielle de 2020: Donald Trump évoque un possible report de l’élection à cause d’un risque de fraude

link.title: Présidentielle de 2020: Donald Trump évoque un possible report de l’élection à cause d’un risque de fraude

entry.content: Le président des Etats-Unis a exprimé sa colère sur twitter face à ce qu’il estime être potentiellement l’élection la plus "inexacte et frauduleuse".
entry.summary: Le président des Etats-Unis a exprimé sa colère sur twitter face à ce qu’il estime être potentiellement l’élection la plus "inexacte et frauduleuse".

entry.title: Man flung through air in freak accident takes out passerby in southern India

link.title: Man flung through air in freak accident takes out passerby in southern India

entry.content:
CCTV captured the shocking and bizarre moment a tuk-tuk driver in Bangalore was flung into the air and smashed into a pedestrian after a wire in the road got caught in traffic.
The footage was captured on July 16 outside a motorbike showroom in Bengaluru’s Thambu Chetty Palya area.
The incident occurred due to an overhanging wire being on the road that was busy with traffic.
The tuk-tuk driver’s vehicle was stuck on the wire and he was trying to dislodge it but an oncoming scooter caught the wire, which yanked it in the opposite direction.
The wire was pulled violently sending the driver high into the air into the direction of the pavement, where he landed on and took out a pedestrian.
The pedestrian was named as a local resident, Sunitha K, 40, who sustained a head injury.
Sunitha was treated at a local hospital and discharged. The driver was reported to have left the scene without serious injury.
Local authorities are investigating the accident.
entry.summary: CCTV captured the shocking and bizarre moment a tuk-tuk driver in Bangalore was flung into the air and smashed into a pedestrian after a wire in the road got caught in traffic. The footage was captured on July 16 outside a motorbike showroom in Bengaluru’s Thambu Chetty Palya area. The incident occurred due to an overhanging wire being on the road that was busy with traffic. The tuk-tuk driver’s vehicle was stuck on the wire and he was trying to dislodge it but an oncoming scooter caught the wire, which yanked it in the opposite direction. The wire was pulled violently sending the driver high into the air into the direction of the pavement, where he landed on and took out a pedestrian. The pedestrian was named as a local resident, Sunitha K, 40, who sustained a head injury. Sunitha was treated at a local hospital and discharged. The driver was reported to have left the scene without serious injury. Local authorities are investigating the accident.

entry.title: Sobrevivir a base de pedidos: la nueva realidad de muchos bares

link.title: Sobrevivir a base de pedidos: la nueva realidad de muchos bares

entry.content: Pasamos una mañana junto a José Manuel en Casa Paco, un lugar tradicional de Madrid con más de 60 años de antigüedad y especializado en tortillas y croquetas. Tras cerrar por el Estado de Alarma, reabrió tras después de Semana Santa y sobrevive a base de pedidos.
entry.summary: Pasamos una mañana junto a José Manuel en Casa Paco, un lugar tradicional de Madrid con más de 60 años de antigüedad y especializado en tortillas y croquetas. Tras cerrar por el Estado de Alarma, reabrió tras después de Semana Santa y sobrevive a base de pedidos.

entry.title: Guru Di Perbatasan Mengajar Siswa Di Rumah

link.title: Guru Di Perbatasan Mengajar Siswa Di Rumah

entry.content:
SITARO, KOMPAS.TV - Medan sulit dan cuaca buruk tak urungkan niat guru di Sitaro, untuk mengajar siswa . Hal ini dilakukan karena tidak semua siswa bisa mengikuti kelas secara daring, selain tidak terjangkau jaringan internet, faktor ekonomi juga menjadi kendala siswa untuk memiliki perangkat pendukung dawai atau handphone.
Inilah visual guru di smp negeri satu siau timur , saat mengunjungi siswa di kampung dame kecamatan siau timur . medan berat tak lantas memupus semangat sebagi pendidik.
Berbekal satu buah papan, Eka Candra Kahiking mengajar siswa hingga ke pelosok kampung.
Hal Ini dilakukan karena tidak semua wilayah di pulau siau bisa disuplai jaringan internet . Selain itu masalah lain yakni faktor ekonomi keluarga yang membuat siswa tak mampu untuk membeli perangkat sebagai media untuk mengikuti pembelajaran secara daring .
Menurut Eka yang juga pernah mengikuti program Sm3t Di Nusa Tenggara Timur 2013 lalu, pendidikan harus terus dihadirkan ke siswa tak peduli apa yang ditemui nantinya sebagai seorang pendidik harus menempatkan pendidikan siswa sebagai prioritas untuk masa depan indonesia kelak.
Cuaca yang memasuki musim hujan menambah tantangan bagi para guru untuk bisa menghadirkan pendidikan bagi para siswa.
#kompastvmanado #guruperbatasan #mengajardirumah
jufri kasumbala kompas tv sitaro sulawesi utara
Saksikan Siaran Kompastv :
Chanel 48 UHF
Fb : Kompastv Manado
Yt : Kompastv Manado
Alamat Studio Kompastv Manado
Jl.Anugerah No.08 Kelurahan Winangun
Kecamatan Malalayang, Kota Manado
Sulawesi Utara
entry.summary: SITARO, KOMPAS.TV - Medan sulit dan cuaca buruk tak urungkan niat guru di Sitaro, untuk mengajar siswa . Hal ini dilakukan karena tidak semua siswa bisa mengikuti kelas secara daring, selain tidak terjangkau jaringan internet, faktor ekonomi juga menjadi kendala siswa untuk memiliki perangkat pendukung dawai atau handphone. Inilah visual guru di smp negeri satu siau timur , saat mengunjungi siswa di kampung dame kecamatan siau timur . medan berat tak lantas memupus semangat sebagi pendidik. Berbekal satu buah papan, Eka Candra Kahiking mengajar siswa hingga ke pelosok kampung. Hal Ini dilakukan karena tidak semua wilayah di pulau siau bisa disuplai jaringan internet . Selain itu masalah lain yakni faktor ekonomi keluarga yang membuat siswa tak mampu untuk membeli perangkat sebagai media untuk mengikuti pembelajaran secara daring . Menurut Eka yang juga pernah mengikuti program Sm3t Di Nusa Tenggara Timur 2013 lalu, pendidikan harus terus dihadirkan ke siswa tak peduli apa yang ditemui nantinya sebagai seorang pendidik harus menempatkan pendidikan siswa sebagai prioritas untuk masa depan indonesia kelak. Cuaca yang memasuki musim hujan menambah tantangan bagi para guru untuk bisa menghadirkan pendidikan bagi para siswa. #kompastvmanado #guruperbatasan #mengajardirumah jufri kasumbala kompas tv sitaro sulawesi utara Saksikan Siaran Kompastv : Chanel 48 UHF Fb : Kompastv Manado Yt : Kompastv Manado Alamat Studio Kompastv Manado Jl.Anugerah No.08 Kelurahan Winangun Kecamatan Malalayang, Kota Manado Sulawesi Utara

#dramasspot
Sen Çal Kapımı 4
Eda, who ties all her hopes to her education, confronts Serkan Bolat, who cuts off her international education scholarship and leaves her with high school diploma. Serkan Bolat offers Eda to give her scholarship back if she pretends to be his fiance for two months. Although Eda rejects the offer of this man as she hates him, she has to accept it when the conditions change. While pretending to be engaged, Serkan and Eda begin to experience a passionate, challenging relationship that will make them forget all they know right. Because love is difficult. And that’s why it’s amazing.
Hande Erçel
as Eda Yildiz
Kerem Bürsin
as Serkan Bolat
Bige Önal
as Selin Atakan
İsmail Ege Şaşmaz
as Kaan Karadag
You Knock On My Door trailer 3 English subtitles
#Hande Erçel
#Kerem Bürsin
(You Knock On My Door)

Serkan Bolat offers Eda to give her scholarship back if she pretends to be his fiance for two months. Although Eda rejects the offer of this man as she hates him, she has to accept it when the conditions change. While pretending to be engaged, Serkan and Eda begin to experience a passionate, challenging relationship that will make them forget all they know right. Because love is difficult. And that’s why it’s amazing. entry.title: Provence : à la recherche de la truffe d’été

link.title: Provence : à la recherche de la truffe d’été

entry.content:
Avec la crise sanitaire, le marché de la truffe noire a été écourté. Les trufficulteurs espèrent se rattraper avec un autre bijou gastronomique : la truffe d’été. Moins connue, elle pourrait pourtant connaitre un vrai succès.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Avec la crise sanitaire, le marché de la truffe noire a été écourté. Les trufficulteurs espèrent se rattraper avec un autre bijou gastronomique : la truffe d’été. Moins connue, elle pourrait pourtant connaitre un vrai succès. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Domestic Stalwart Rajat Bhatia announces his retirement from all forms of cricket वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Domestic Stalwart Rajat Bhatia announces his retirement from all forms of cricket वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Domestic veteran Rajat Bhatia announced retirement from all forms of cricket and he looks back at his long career with "no regrets" after coming close to play for India in 2014. The 40-year-old all-rounder started his career with Tamil Nadu in 2003-04 but played most of his cricket for Delhi. In the 2018-19, he guided new entrants Uttarakhand to the Ranji Trophy quarterfinals.Bhatia, who was considered Delhi cricket’s crisis man, played 112 first-class games, scoring 6482 runs at an average of 49.10 apart from taking 137 wickets at 27.97. He also played 119 List A games and 146 T20s.
घरेलू क्रिकेट के सबसे बड़े खिलाड़ियों में से एक रजत भाटिया ने संन्यास ले लिया है. रजत भाटिया ने खेल के सभी प्रारूपों को अलविदा कह दिया है. यानी अब बल्ले और गेंद से चौके-छक्के लगाते हुए रजत भाटिया आपको नहीं दिखेंगे. रजत भाटिया दिल्ली क्रिकेट के सबसे बड़े खिलाड़ियों में से रहे हैं और लगभग 20 साल का उनका क्रिकेट करियर भी रहा. इन 20 सालों में उन्हें कभी नीली जर्सी पहनने का मौका नहीं मिला. बावजूद इसके उनकी गिनती भारत के बेहतरीन घरेलू खिलाड़ियों में होती रही थी. ऑलराउंडर खिलाड़ी थे इसलिए बल्ले और गेंद से प्रभावित करने का मौका नहीं गंवाते थे. आपको बता दें, 1999-2000 में रणजी तमिल नाडु के खिलाफ घरेलू क्रिकेट में डेब्यू किया था.
#RajatBhatia #Delhi #KKR
entry.summary: Domestic veteran Rajat Bhatia announced retirement from all forms of cricket and he looks back at his long career with "no regrets" after coming close to play for India in 2014. The 40-year-old all-rounder started his career with Tamil Nadu in 2003-04 but played most of his cricket for Delhi. In the 2018-19, he guided new entrants Uttarakhand to the Ranji Trophy quarterfinals.Bhatia, who was considered Delhi cricket’s crisis man, played 112 first-class games, scoring 6482 runs at an average of 49.10 apart from taking 137 wickets at 27.97. He also played 119 List A games and 146 T20s. घरेलू क्रिकेट के सबसे बड़े खिलाड़ियों में से एक रजत भाटिया ने संन्यास ले लिया है. रजत भाटिया ने खेल के सभी प्रारूपों को अलविदा कह दिया है. यानी अब बल्ले और गेंद से चौके-छक्के लगाते हुए रजत भाटिया आपको नहीं दिखेंगे. रजत भाटिया दिल्ली क्रिकेट के सबसे बड़े खिलाड़ियों में से रहे हैं और लगभग 20 साल का उनका क्रिकेट करियर भी रहा. इन 20 सालों में उन्हें कभी नीली जर्सी पहनने का मौका नहीं मिला. बावजूद इसके उनकी गिनती भारत के बेहतरीन घरेलू खिलाड़ियों में होती रही थी. ऑलराउंडर खिलाड़ी थे इसलिए बल्ले और गेंद से प्रभावित करने का मौका नहीं गंवाते थे. आपको बता दें, 1999-2000 में रणजी तमिल नाडु के खिलाफ घरेलू क्रिकेट में डेब्यू किया था. #RajatBhatia #Delhi #KKR

entry.title: US Covid deaths: 1 succumbed every minute on Wednesday & more news Oneindia News

link.title: US Covid deaths: 1 succumbed every minute on Wednesday & more news Oneindia News

entry.content:
India records over 50,000 Covid cases in a single day; US records 1 Covid-19 death every minute on Wednesday; In Manipur, 3 soldiers of Assam Rifles killed in line of duty, ambushed by insurgents near Myanmar border; Google, Facebook CEOs grilled most by US congress in anti-trust hearing ; In Delhi, diesel cheaper by over Rs 8, VAT cut; Rajasthan Assembly session to finally convene from August 14 and more news
#Covid19 #CongressHearing #AntiTrustHearing
entry.summary: India records over 50,000 Covid cases in a single day; US records 1 Covid-19 death every minute on Wednesday; In Manipur, 3 soldiers of Assam Rifles killed in line of duty, ambushed by insurgents near Myanmar border; Google, Facebook CEOs grilled most by US congress in anti-trust hearing ; In Delhi, diesel cheaper by over Rs 8, VAT cut; Rajasthan Assembly session to finally convene from August 14 and more news #Covid19 #CongressHearing #AntiTrustHearing

entry.title: Katrina Kaif ने बार-बार Copy किया दूसरों का Style, जमकर उड़ा मज़ाक । Boldsky

link.title: Katrina Kaif ने बार-बार Copy किया दूसरों का Style, जमकर उड़ा मज़ाक । Boldsky

entry.content:
Katrina Kaif is known for her amazing acting sense in addition to her stunning acting, but sometimes Katrina’s style is such that the trollers give the name of cheap copy. Yes, Katrina Kaif, who has always been hit and fit, has impressed everyone in her blockbuster career by wearing more than one dress. But sometimes seeing Katrina’s style, we are forced to think why is she wearing the clothes of others every time? In such a situation, today we are showing you those pictures of him, whenever he copied the style.
कटरीना कैफ (Katrina Kaif) यूं तो अपनी शानदार एक्टिंग के अलावा अपने कमाल के ड्रेसिंग सेंस को लेकर भी जानी जाती हैं, लेकिन कभी-कभार कटरीना का स्टाइल ऐसा होता है जिसे ट्रोलर्स सस्ती कॉपी का नाम दे देते हैं। जी हां, हमेशा हिट एंड फिट रहने वाली कैटरीना कैफ ने अपने ब्लॉकबस्टर करियर में एक से बढ़कर एक ड्रेसेस को पहनकर सभी को इम्प्रेस किया है। लेकिन कभी-कभार कटरीना के स्टाइल को देखकर हम ये सोचने पर मजबूर हो जाते हैं कि आखिरकार वह हर बार दूसरों के कपड़े क्यों पहनती हैं? ऐसे में आज हम आपको दिखा रहे हैं उनकी वो तस्वीरें, जब-जब उन्होंने स्टाइल कॉपी किया।
#KatrinaKaif
entry.summary: Katrina Kaif is known for her amazing acting sense in addition to her stunning acting, but sometimes Katrina’s style is such that the trollers give the name of cheap copy. Yes, Katrina Kaif, who has always been hit and fit, has impressed everyone in her blockbuster career by wearing more than one dress. But sometimes seeing Katrina’s style, we are forced to think why is she wearing the clothes of others every time? In such a situation, today we are showing you those pictures of him, whenever he copied the style. कटरीना कैफ (Katrina Kaif) यूं तो अपनी शानदार एक्टिंग के अलावा अपने कमाल के ड्रेसिंग सेंस को लेकर भी जानी जाती हैं, लेकिन कभी-कभार कटरीना का स्टाइल ऐसा होता है जिसे ट्रोलर्स सस्ती कॉपी का नाम दे देते हैं। जी हां, हमेशा हिट एंड फिट रहने वाली कैटरीना कैफ ने अपने ब्लॉकबस्टर करियर में एक से बढ़कर एक ड्रेसेस को पहनकर सभी को इम्प्रेस किया है। लेकिन कभी-कभार कटरीना के स्टाइल को देखकर हम ये सोचने पर मजबूर हो जाते हैं कि आखिरकार वह हर बार दूसरों के कपड़े क्यों पहनती हैं? ऐसे में आज हम आपको दिखा रहे हैं उनकी वो तस्वीरें, जब-जब उन्होंने स्टाइल कॉपी किया। #KatrinaKaif

entry.title: कर्फ्यू में बाहर निकलने पर युवकों को पुलिस ने उल्टा लिटाकर लाठी से पीटा, वायरल हुआ वीडियो

link.title: कर्फ्यू में बाहर निकलने पर युवकों को पुलिस ने उल्टा लिटाकर लाठी से पीटा, वायरल हुआ वीडियो

entry.content: अहमदाबाद। यहां पुलिसकर्मियों ने रात्रि कर्फ्यू के दौरान बाहर निकले युवकों को बुरी तरह पीटा। युवकों को पहले सड़क पर लिटाया उसके बाद उन्हें लाठियां मारीं। लाठी मारते वक्त पुलिसकर्मियों को जरा-सा भी रहम नहीं आया। इस घटना का वीडियो सामने आया है, जिसमें आप देख सकते हैं किस तरह लाठियां मारी गईं।
entry.summary: अहमदाबाद। यहां पुलिसकर्मियों ने रात्रि कर्फ्यू के दौरान बाहर निकले युवकों को बुरी तरह पीटा। युवकों को पहले सड़क पर लिटाया उसके बाद उन्हें लाठियां मारीं। लाठी मारते वक्त पुलिसकर्मियों को जरा-सा भी रहम नहीं आया। इस घटना का वीडियो सामने आया है, जिसमें आप देख सकते हैं किस तरह लाठियां मारी गईं।

entry.title: Race Car Crashes With Another And Tumbles Sideways

entry.content: During this race, one of the cars crashed with another and ended up tumbling sideways while the other car also broke down on the spot.

entry.title: Real EVPs & UFOs. Shapeshifting Antimatter UFOs & Electronic Voice Phenomena Caught On Camera!

link.title: Real EVPs & UFOs. Shapeshifting Antimatter UFOs & Electronic Voice Phenomena Caught On Camera!

entry.content: Are UFOs Alive? While recording several different shape shifting UFOs I also recorded several EVPs or Electronic Voice Phenomena. Santilli Telescope has Discovered Antimatter organisms. NASA discovers plankton living on the surface of the International Space Station. A Slow Motion Frame by Frame look at the Shape-shifting action of these UFOs. #shapeshifter #UFO #evp .

entry.title: Mutant frog with four arms worshipped by locals in north eastern Thailand

link.title: Mutant frog with four arms worshipped by locals in north eastern Thailand

entry.content:
A mutant frog with four arms amazed superstitious locals - who made offerings to it for good luck.
The amphibian was found in a family’s well in Surin, northeastern Thailand, where it was rescued. It had two extra arms protruding from its right shoulder.
House owner Uan Conaban said that when he noticed the two extra limbs he quickly pulled the frog from the water and took it into his home.
His neighbours are now praying to the frog, hoping it will bring them winning lottery numbers.
Uan said: “There are always many frogs in the well but I noticed one was separated from the others.
"I picked it up to look close and saw that it had six limbs. I have been hand-rearing it in my home ever since.
“When the neighbours found out about my lucky charm they stopped by periodically to worship it and ask for lucky lottery numbers for the upcoming draw."
Uan said that the frog is strong and healthy since he found it earlier this month on July 16.
'’His extra arms are strong and he can move them but not as well as the others,’’ he added.
entry.summary: A mutant frog with four arms amazed superstitious locals - who made offerings to it for good luck. The amphibian was found in a family’s well in Surin, northeastern Thailand, where it was rescued. It had two extra arms protruding from its right shoulder. House owner Uan Conaban said that when he noticed the two extra limbs he quickly pulled the frog from the water and took it into his home. His neighbours are now praying to the frog, hoping it will bring them winning lottery numbers. Uan said: “There are always many frogs in the well but I noticed one was separated from the others. "I picked it up to look close and saw that it had six limbs. I have been hand-rearing it in my home ever since. “When the neighbours found out about my lucky charm they stopped by periodically to worship it and ask for lucky lottery numbers for the upcoming draw." Uan said that the frog is strong and healthy since he found it earlier this month on July 16. '’His extra arms are strong and he can move them but not as well as the others,’’ he added.
